Mix of Lithostratigraphy in Overburden section and sequence stratigraphy at reservoir level for reservoir zonation (flow units).

Mainly used for the overburden on Snorre but it is also used by Tordis/Vigdis for both overburden and reservoir based on lithology (ex. Brent formations Tarbert to Broom, different from the seq strati based Tordis Vigdis Seq Strat with B6 to Brent 1 zonation)
